title: Research Input Schema
description: Schema for log-research.py JSON input. Documents research findings and investigations.

examples: Which database provides better performance for our use case?

Proceed with PostgreSQL, optimize join queries
Official docs, Stack Overflow performance discussion, blog.example.com/db-comparison

questions.description: Related question IDs. Can be single ID, comma-separated string, or array.

stories.description: Related story numbers. Can be single story, comma-separated string, or array.
